description_long: This is a round, single-tier cake with a glossy, dark chocolate ganache coating that creates a mirror-like surface. The sides of the cake are finished with a smooth, metallic bronze or copper-colored layer, giving it a luxurious appearance. On top, the cake is adorned with a single golden-brown macaron and two tall, spiraled white chocolate decorations, adding height and elegance. The cake sits on a square, gold-colored cake board with a subtle embossed pattern. The overall style is modern and minimalist, with a focus on clean lines and striking contrasts. The cake appears rich and decadent, suitable for upscale urban celebrations or patisseries.
description: A round, glossy chocolate cake with bronze sides, topped with a macaron and white chocolate spirals, presented on a gold cake board. The style is modern and elegant.
description_view_0: Front view shows the glossy chocolate top, macaron, and white chocolate spirals clearly, with the bronze sides and gold board visible.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the height and curve of the white chocolate spirals, with the macaron partially obscured and the bronze sides prominent.
description_view_2: The back view shows the white chocolate spirals from behind and the macaron at the rear, with the smooth bronze sides and gold board.
description_view_3: This side view displays the macaron and spirals from a different angle, emphasizing the cake's round shape and metallic finish.
